# Agentic Engineering Patterns (CONCEPT:AHE-3.14)

## Overview
Out-of-the-box support for TDD Cycles (Red-Green-Refactor), First Run Tests, Agentic Manual Testing, Code Walkthroughs, and Interactive Explanations.
